description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a matte black metal barrel and receiver paired with a reddish-brown wooden stock and fore-end. The barrel is relatively short, suggesting a tactical or home-defense configuration, and is fitted with a simple front bead sight. The wooden stock is full-sized, ergonomically shaped, and smoothly finished, providing a solid shoulder rest. The fore-end is ribbed for grip, indicating its function as a pump mechanism for chambering rounds. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall construction appears sturdy, with visible screws and metal fittings reinforcing the connection between the wooden and metal components.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a short black barrel, reddish-brown wooden stock, and ribbed fore-end, designed for robust use. The design is utilitarian, with a rounded trigger guard and visible metal fittings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and short black barrel.
description_view_1: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the barrel and the narrow profile of the shotgun, with the ribbed fore-end visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and short barrel from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the ribbed fore-end visible along the top.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short tactical length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, enclosing the trigger with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
